name: Deploy Configurator
description: Reads pipeline-config, secrets-plan, and test-config contracts to produce the final merge deployment configuration. Requires human review before the workflow YAML is applied to the repository. Any decline of review escalates rather than aborting — the config can be revised and resubmitted.

checks.pass: pipeline-config contract available — loading GitHub Actions workflow YAML
checks.fail: pipeline-config contract not available — cannot produce final config without pipeline design

checks.pass: secrets-plan contract available — loading secrets storage and access configuration
checks.fail: secrets-plan contract not available — cannot configure deployment without secrets management plan

checks.pass: test-config contract available — loading coverage thresholds and test commands
checks.fail: test-config contract not available — cannot configure deployment without validated test configuration

checks.prompt: Produce the final deployment configuration by merging the pipeline-config, secrets-plan, and test-config contracts into a complete, ready-to-apply package. Include: (1) COMPLETE WORKFLOW YAML: final merged .github/workflows/ci-cd.yml file incorporating all jobs, caching strategy, matrix config, environment gates, secrets references (by name, not value), test commands with thresholds, and Docker build steps. (2) ENVIRONMENT MATRIX: three-environment definition — dev (auto-deploy on feature branch push), staging (auto-deploy on main merge, smoke tests required), production (manual approval gate, 1-hour window, requires two approvers). (3) ROLLBACK STRATEGY PER ENVIRONMENT: dev — no rollback needed; staging — redeploy previous tag; production — immediate revert via git revert + emergency deploy workflow. (4) DEPLOYMENT NOTIFICATIONS: Slack webhook notification template for deploy start, success, and failure events with job name, environment, commit SHA, and actor. (5) SLA TARGETS: lint:<3min, test:<10min, build:<5min, docker-build:<8min, deploy-staging:<5min, deploy-production:<10min. Set hasRollbackStrategy:true and hasEnvironmentMatrix:true when all three environments are defined.
checks.pass: Deploy configuration complete — all environments, rollback strategies, notifications, and SLA targets defined; ready for human review
checks.fail: Deploy configuration incomplete — missing required environment definitions or rollback strategies
